LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHELLE LANDRY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION AND OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION WITH TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH TO STATE OR ALLEGE WHY HER CONTRACT CALIMS ARE NOR BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MICHELLE LANDRY'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND PLAINTIFF'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS IS GRANTED. THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BARRED BY THE TWO YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS SET FORTH IN CCP 339(1). PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED A SATISFACTORY EXPLANATION FOR HER RETRACTION OF HER PRIOR SWORN AND UNSWORN STATEMENTS THAT THE BREACH OCCURRED MORE THAN TWO YEARS PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THIS ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
ANSWER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LANDRY, MICHELLE L.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Set For Trial On Nov-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Continued To May-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MICHELLE LANDRY, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHELLE LANDRY'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to the first and third causes of action. The request for judicial notice of Plaintiff's verified responses to Defendant's special interrogatories and Plaintiff's Case Management Conference Statements is granted. The first and third causes of action are barred by the two year statute of limitations set forth in CCP 339(1). Plaintiff has not provided a satisfactory explanation for her retraction of her prior sworn and unsworn statements that the breach occurred more than two years prior to the filing of this action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Natalie Ann Garcia of Natalie Ann Garcia Attorney at Law, (415-3625-2529) appearing for plaintiff.
Atty. Donald J. Putterman of Putterman/Logan/Giles LLP, (415-839-5202) special appearing for defendant.

Argued - DEFENDANT MICHELLE"s Motion For Protective Order is granted and sanctions awarded in the amount of $500.00 shall be paid within thirty days. Order signed in open court. Parties stipulated have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Continued To Apr-06-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. NATALIE ANN GARCIA, TEL. NO. 362-2529 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CONSTANCE J. YU OF SIDEMAN & BANCROFT, LLP, TEL. NO. 733-3904 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT LANDRY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MICHELLE LANDRY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Sustained without leave to amend as to the fourth causes of action and overruled as to the second cause of action with ten days to answer. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the first and third causes of action if Plaintiff can do so in good faith to state or allege why her contract calims are nor barred by the Statute of Limitations. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Continued To Feb-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Defendant Michelle Landry's demurrer to complaint is off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed on September 29, 2011. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7770 =(302/HEK)
